problem_addressed: Deterministic embeddings from standard vision-language models struggle to capture uncertainties arising from ambiguities in visual/textual descriptions and multiple possible correspondences between modalities.
core_claim: GroVE achieves state-of-the-art uncertainty calibration by obtaining probabilistic embeddings from frozen VLMs through a post-hoc Gaussian Process Latent Variable Model approach.
key_contributions: GroVE framework for post-hoc probabilistic embeddings from frozen VLMs
GPLVM-based shared latent space learning with single-modal reconstruction and cross-modal alignment objectives
Demonstrated superior uncertainty calibration across cross-modal retrieval, VQA, and active learning tasks
novelty: Unlike prior probabilistic embedding methods requiring VLM retraining, GroVE operates post-hoc on frozen VLMs (e.g., CLIP, BLIP) using GPLVM to learn uncertainty-aware representations without modifying the original model.
method_summary: GroVE builds a shared low-dimensional latent space using GPLVM where image and text inputs map to unified representations, optimized through single-modal embedding reconstruction and cross-modal alignment objectives to generate uncertainty-aware probabilistic embeddings.
method_components: Gaussian Process Latent Variable Model (GPLVM) framework
key_innovation: Leveraging GPLVM's predictive distribution p(g*) = ∫ p(g*|x*)p(x*|z*, zM)dx* to capture uncertainty from both latent space uncertainty and inherent noise, enabling uncertainty quantification without VLM retraining.
assumptions: Frozen VLM embeddings provide meaningful representations for latent space learning
Low-dimensional latent space (Q=5 or 10) sufficiently captures cross-modal relationships
GP hyperparameters (inducing points, trade-off parameters) can be tuned via grid search
theoretical_grounding: The predictive distribution derivation shows how uncertainty in latent space (z*) propagates to prediction uncertainty through ˆΣ*, accounting for variance from both latent uncertainty and inherent noise.
headline_result: GroVE with KL-Divergence achieves best cross-modal alignment
best_result: GroVE with KL-Divergence achieves best cross-modal alignment
title: Probabilistic Embeddings for Frozen Vision-Language Models: Uncertainty Quantification with Gaussian Process Latent Variable Models
